description: Transfer Stitch reference designs for Library / Knowledge / Sentence / Dictionary / Video surfaces into Flutter with content-correct, multilingual, light/dark-safe components.

tasks.title: Freeze Stitch design inventory and acceptance rules
tasks.notes: Captured current Stitch pages, accepted design direction, rejected navigation/color artifacts, content correctness rules, multilingual rules, light/dark token policy, route policy, component plan, and validation gates.

tasks.title: Define Library light/dark semantic token plan
tasks.notes: Defined Stitch color authority boundaries, recommended LibraryReferenceColors ThemeExtension, required surface/text/domain/interaction token families, initial palette direction, accessibility gates, and a Stitch prompt for palette exploration.

tasks.title: Audit current Flutter Library components against Stitch direction
tasks.notes: Mapped current Knowledge, Sentence, Dictionary, and Video components to real artifact fields and shared component boundaries. Confirmed the gap is presentation/component structure rather than data aggregate availability.

tasks.title: Implement shared Library reference tokens and base components
tasks.notes: In progress. Added LibraryReferenceColors ThemeExtension, registered light/dark tokens in AppTheme, and introduced shared stateless components: LibrarySectionCard, EvidenceChip, TargetTextBlock, LearnerTranslationBlock, TokenBreakdownTile, InlineExampleGroup, SemanticExampleTable, SourceMomentCard, RelatedKnowledgeCard, and DictionarySenseCard. KnowledgeModuleCard now delegates inline examples and semantic tables to shared components and uses LibraryReferenceColors instead of hardcoded Material colors. Remaining work: video-specific focus/transcript cards and final component naming cleanup.

tasks.title: Redesign Sentence Detail as sentence microscope
tasks.notes: In progress. SentenceDetailScreen now shows sentence chunks only once: full sentence segmentations are rendered inline as tappable chunks, supplementary lookup words stay in the separate breakdown section, and dictionary lookup updates one in-page detail panel immediately below the sentence card instead of after source/knowledge/vocab sections or in a bottom sheet. Token chips now use LibraryReferenceColors for light/dark-safe selected states and avoid duplicate panel titles during atom switching. Remaining work: refine visual density and connect dictionary-specific sense cards where applicable.

tasks.title: Redesign Knowledge Detail with semantic examples and tables
tasks.notes: Completed first production pass. KnowledgeItemReaderView now uses LibrarySectionCard, TargetTextBlock, LearnerTranslationBlock, InlineExampleGroup, EvidenceChip, and SourceMomentCard for the detail header and reference sections. KnowledgeModuleCard resolves inline sentence refs into shared example groups, renders markdown tables with SemanticExampleTable, deduplicates bottom practical examples already used inline, and sanitizes unresolved raw [id:...] refs from display. Added regression tests for inline ref resolution, bottom example dedupe, and markdown table conversion.

tasks.title: Redesign Dictionary Entry Detail
tasks.notes: In progress. DictionaryMeaningSection now renders structured senses through shared DictionarySenseCard, normalizes sparse homograph entry numbers, and displays Korean-dictionary-style labels such as headword 1/headword 2 instead of Entry labels or superscripts. DictionaryContent now renders morphology/component rows through DictionaryComponentRow, candidate choices through DictionaryCandidateCard, and related examples through DictionaryExampleCard. It uses DictionaryFallbackNotice without debug fallback strings or raw [MISSING ID] copy, and hides empty examples instead of hardcoding placeholder copy. Latest slice completed: DictionarySenseCard now separates grouped sense lines, dictionary component rows are denser, and dictionary examples are capped/compacted as representative learning examples instead of a long sentence-bank dump. Remaining work: later UIStrings/i18n pass for remaining static section labels.

tasks.title: Redesign Video Player learning overlay
tasks.notes: In progress. First interaction slice implemented in lingo-frontend-web: normal transcript taps now update one in-page LingoDictionaryPanel below the player, fullscreen subtitle taps route through selectedCluster to one side panel, and InteractiveSubtitle disables floating dictionary overlays in video. ParsedTextWithDictionary no longer debounces parent-managed lookup callbacks, so tapping another token immediately updates the same panel. Latest slice completed: added VideoTranscriptLineCard, moved transcript current-line/timestamp/loop/translation colors onto LibraryReferenceColors, allowed InteractiveSubtitle highlight color injection for video, and styled LingoDictionaryPanel as a reference surface. Also repaired video test mocks for supported subtitle locale lookup so the E2E gate exercises the real screen path.

tasks.title: Redesign Knowledge Index as reference browser
tasks.notes: Completed first production pass. KnowledgeLabHomeScreen is now a Knowledge-First Lab reference browser, not a count dashboard or source-first home. Added centralized KnowledgeReferenceCardView derivation in the page controller, with target surface, learner title, markdown-sanitized preview, level/kind/subcategory/tags, and one resolved example sentence. KnowledgeItemCard now renders reference cards with example evidence and LibraryReferenceColors. Topic/vocab lanes are secondary and hidden while sparse. Added widget coverage for dark mode, raw ID suppression, example resolution, search/tag filtering, and card tap navigation.

tasks.title: Prepare canonical Library route migration brief
tasks.notes: Only after UI stabilizes, brief /library/knowledge, /library/sentences, /library/dictionary/entry, and /library/videos redirects.
